Ergenverse 0.1.3-alpha — Renegade Immortal (仙逆)

Forge mod recreating the Renegade Immortal novel in Minecraft 1.20.1.

Mod list

  • ergenverse-0.1.3-alpha.jar — the Er Gen universe simulation (814+ classes: cultivation, body refining, alchemy, beasts, flora, formations, talismans, canon/divine sense, NPC AI). Bundled in overrides/mods/.

Requirements

  • Minecraft 1.20.1
  • Forge 47.4.0 (declared in manifest.json; CurseForge auto-installs on import)
  • Java 17 (Forge 1.20.1 requirement)

Install

  1. Open the CurseForge app.
  2. Click + Create Custom Profile → Import.
  3. Select ergenverse-modpack-0.1.3-alpha.zip.
  4. CurseForge installs Forge 47.4.0 and the mod automatically. Launch the profile.

What's new in 0.1.3-alpha

  • 103 loot table parse errors fixed → 0 (loot tables now load cleanly)
  • 30 missing item registrations (spirit stones, beast cores, equipment/artifacts)
  • Client main-menu crash fixed (ERKeybinds MOD/FORGE bus split)
  • spirit_stone_wall blockstate fix (324 model bakery warnings → 0)
  • Registry freeze crash from duplicate item names fixed
  • Version discipline established (see CHANGELOG.md)
